params.summary: Implemented vector DB with contiguous storage, SIMD-accelerated L2 distance (AVX-512/AVX2), and parallel block-scanned top-k selection. Added rayon thread pool setup, per-thread TopK reduction, and fast distance kernels. Current implementation passes correctness with high recall and improved QPS over baseline.

output.status: Evaluation complete. Summary: Implemented vector DB with contiguous storage, SIMD-accelerated L2 distance (AVX-512/AVX2), and parallel block-scanned top-k selection. Added rayon thread pool setup, per-thread TopK reduction, and fast distance kernels. Current implementation passes correctness with high recall and improved QPS over baseline.. Final QPS: 57.90, Recall: 0.9993
